steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content: In the function, $x$ is the number of years after the initial investment. Therefore, $f(2)$ refers to the value of the CD after $2$ years.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content:
The output $f(2)$ is approximately $9{,}474.08$, the CD's total value in dollars at that time, not the interest rate, not days, and not the amount above the initial value.
The answer is C.
